request_payload.exposure_text: As someone who values both national security and civil liberties, I've been concerned about the burden our alliances place on us. Did you know that our allies in NATO only spend an average of 1.5% of GDP on defense, while we carry more than our fair share? It's time we have a serious conversation about fair burden-sharing. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
